---
title: "From coursework to research questions"
date: 2026-02-12
description: "A placeholder entry for future thoughts on how class assignments develop into longer research projects."
categories: [placeholder, phd]
title-block-banner: false
---

This placeholder keeps space open for future writing about the transition from class exercises to durable research questions.

It also gives the blog page a fuller structure now, which helps the site feel complete even before regular posts begin.
